keys.title: Sign in
keys.descriptionDefault: Sign in with the email registered for your workspace.
keys.descriptionEmailLocked: We'll send a verification code to this address to sign in.
keys.descriptionPackageFunnel: Sign in or create an account to continue to payment.
keys.descriptionPortalPassword: Enter your email. We will send a verification code, then you can create your service administrator password.
keys.descriptionLoginGate: Sign in with your email and password. We will email a verification code next.
keys.emailLockedHint: This address was verified on pregoi.com and cannot be changed here.
keys.invalidCredentials: Invalid email or password. Please try again.
keys.singpassUnavailableBody: Singpass is not configured. Please use email verification or contact support.
keys.passwordResetSuccess: Your service administrator password was updated. Sign in with your new password.
keys.packageFunnelSignedInIntro: You're signed in as {email}. Continue to payment for your selected plan, or use a different account.
keys.trialContinueTrial: Continue from the {host} trial — sign in to start your 14-day free trial (no payment required).
keys.trialContinueFree: Continue from the {host} trial — sign in to finish free-plan onboarding (no payment).
